release_notes: NEW: Cairo font in toast notifications for better Arabic text rendering. Enhanced athan notifications with toast at prayer time. Plus keyboard shortcut (Ctrl+T) to test reminders.
features: Prayer times calculation for 6 major methods
Hijri date display with ±1 day adjustment
Toast notifications with settings quick access
Duaa after Athan - Automatic spiritual duas
Cairo font support for Arabic text (NEW in v1.0.10)
changelog: NEW: Cairo font in toast notifications for better Arabic rendering
NEW: Toast notification appears when athan plays at prayer time
NEW: Keyboard shortcut Ctrl+T to test athan notification
IMPROVED: Larger font sizes in toast notifications (16/14/12)
IMPROVED: Font style set to normal (no italic)
FIXED: Font embedding as WPF resource for proper rendering
FIXED: Athan sound plays once when prayer time occurs
FIXED: Setup upgrade path with REINSTALLMODE support
